g.title: Entity Relationship Diagram created by erdantic

a.xlink:title:
aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.ActionLookUpTableFactory
Factory for loading and configuring a look-up table image used to map action inputs to output values

aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.AindBehaviorTelekinesisTaskLogic
Task logic definition for the Telekinesis behavior task

aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.AindTelekinesisTaskParameters
Task parameters for the Telekinesis task

aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.Environment
Defines the structure of the behavioral environment as a sequence of blocks

aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.OperationControl
Top-level operational settings including LUT registry and spout control

aind_behavior_telekinesis.task_logic.SpoutOperationControl
Control settings for the reward spout
